name: Geyserlands
short_description: Geyserlands is a deck-building game of modern otherworldly mystery. Gain new cards and upgrade your deck as you explore the mystery of Geyserlands. Unlock secret powers and gain special advantages. How will your story end in Geyserlands?
detailed_description:
Geyserlands is a deck-building game of modern otherworldly mystery. You are a detective just assigned to a national park nobody knows exists.  Gain new cards and upgrade your deck as you explore the mystery of Geyserlands. Unlock secret powers and gain special advantages. But delve too deep and Geyserlands will consume you. How will your story end in Geyserlands?

Key Features

  • Build a deck from hundreds of cards that tell the story of your character's history, abilities, insights and connections.

  • Use the cards you draw each turn to solve some of Geyserlands' hundreds of mysteries.

  • Solve mysteries to earn new and better cards and remove weaker cards from your deck.

  • Escape despair and death with a variety of upgradable healing cards that prevent Geyserlands from consuming you.

  • Earn strange powers and supernatural edges that allow you to push your luck and accomplish the impossible.

  • Unravel the secrets of Geyserlands.

  • However your story ends, you will gain new cards for your next journey.
